_comment: Default (English) manifest strings. VS Code substitutes %key% placeholders in package.json with the value here, picking package.nls.<vscode.env.language>.json when available.
command.showDashboard.title: BurnRate: Show Dashboard
command.refresh.title: BurnRate: Refresh Data
config.language.description: UI language for the BurnRate dashboard. "auto" follows your VS Code display language. Command and setting labels in this panel update on editor restart; the dashboard itself updates immediately.
config.customPricing.markdownDescription: Inline pricing overrides for models not covered by the built-in Claude / GPT pricing. Each entry: `"<model>": { "input": ..., "output": ..., "cache_write_5m": ..., "cache_write_1h": ..., "cache_read": ..., "reasoning_output": ... }` in USD per 1M tokens. `cache_write` is still accepted as a legacy alias for `cache_write_5m`. `reasoning_output` defaults to `output`.
config.spikeThresholdUsd.description: Mark assistant turns above this USD cost as spikes.
config.ignoredUnpricedModels.markdownDes: Models to suppress from the unknown-pricing warning banner. They still count as unpriced ($0) unless you add them to `burnRate.customPricing`.
config.showStatusBar.description: Show today's token usage in the status bar.
config.statusBarRefreshSeconds.descripti: How often the status bar refreshes today's usage, in seconds.
config.monthlyBudget.description: Monthly USD budget — surfaced in the dashboard's burn-rate hero. Set to 0 to hide the budget bar.
